threats.title: Data leakage of user details
threats.description: The user details get leaked to unauthorized users or to the public.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Overloading media database
threats.description: Attackers can connect to the camera upload link, and send too many requests to the media server so that it crashes.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Unable to authorize user, when service is down
threats.description: If the external authentication servier is being attacked by a DOS-attack, it won't be able to process requests from legit users, and the entire system can't process guest or staff requests.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Intruders gets server privileges
threats.description: Intruder gets access to booking server, and adds themselves to the authorized guests list without being approved.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Booking server is down due to being overloaded
threats.description: Attackers send a plethora of requests to the booking server in order to crash it.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Booking as another person
threats.description: A user books a trip as a person that they do not have permission from.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Guest Data Compromised
threats.description: Unauthorized staff get access to de-anonymized guest data.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Tampered data from cameras
threats.description: Someone tampers with the images coming from the cameras to hide intruders.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Misidentification of guests and intruders
threats.description: We assume that staff are notified of what the AI identifies guests and intruders as. A guest could be identified as an intruder, and an intruder could be identified as a guest.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: AI leaks de-anonymized guests
threats.description: When the AI reports if the anonymized guests are legit guests or intruders, it could leak the connection between the anonymized and de-anonymized guest.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Lack of logging for AI actions
threats.description: We assume that the AI's actions are not logged, so there is no way for us to know how the AI identifies users.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A
